calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elias Bizannes in Propria Persona.
Irina Lozhkina in Propria Persona.

The Court explained that a petition to establish fact of marriage is used when a marriage is not registered or when a certified copy of a marriage certificate is not available, noted that the parties have a marriage license and an apostille, and questions if the parties have had any issues with anyone refusing to honor their marriage. Mr. Bizannes stated that they have had no issues with anyone and that they are just trying to get a way to get their marriage recognized in America. The Court informed the parties that they can get an official translation of their documents and once again noted that they already have certification and proof of marriage. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is denied.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
